title: CornCraft: Refabricated
description: Third installment of the CornCraft series of modpacks now running on Fabric
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**NOTE**: This modpack is still a work in progress. Some of the features mentioned in this description are incomplete or will be added later on.

</details>

From the creators of [CornCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/corncraft) and [CornCraft 2: Danger Days](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/corncraft-2-danger-days) comes a brand new modpack on the Fabric modloader! Sail away to distant lands on a [Small Ship](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) or fly away into the horizon on a biplane from [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) while [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) allows you to see beyond your render distance without your computer exploding. Then, bring home the loot you've discovered on your journey and use it to build the factory of your dreams using the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) mod and the various addons we've included! On your journey, you may find some unique crops to expand your farm. With [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), you have a plethora of recipes to cook with the new ingredient's you've found! All these new features to explore may seem daunting at first, but with the help of the [Heracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/heracles) mod, we've included many quests to help guide you through the various mods in this pack.

### Here are some of the most prominent mods in the CornCraft 3 experience not mentioned in the description:
- [Antique Atlas 4](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4)
- [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
- [Immersive Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/immersive-structures)
- [Leawind's Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/leawind-third-person)
- [Music Maker Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-maker-mod)
- [NiftyCarts](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts)
- [Stellarity ~ Lite](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stellarity-lite)
- [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)
- [Universal Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-graves)
